work_order.project_title: Midnight Signals — AI Spooky Short for Teens
work_order.objective:
You are creative-dev for project 'spooky-teen-shortfilm' (Campfire Repeat: 3D woods, five teens, cell service dies; relighting the campfire snaps time back 5 minutes). Create a clean storyboard redraw using the provided reference image for style/mood.

Reference (use as inspiration for lighting/composition/palette):
- /home/james/Hermes/state/hermes/profiles/operator/cache/images/img_a9022810b6e5.png

Goal
- Produce 10 clean storyboard frames (PNG), clearly drawn (lo-fi is fine but not blocky), with readable silhouettes, lighting cues (warm fire, moon rim, lantern), and key props (tent, sign, lantern, logs, backpacks, bedroll, roasting stick).
- 16:9 master framing with center-safe composition (for later vertical crops).

Use These Inputs (already in project root):
- storyboards/storyboard_manifest_v0.csv (shot refs & must-includes)
- beats_campfire-repeat.md (beats)
- shot_list_v0_campfire-repeat.md (22-shot plan)
- vo_script_outline_campfire-repeat.md (timing cues)
- lookdev/shader_ramps.md (lighting mood only)

Deliverables & Paths (MANDATORY)
- Save frames to: /home/james/Hermes/state/projects/spooky-teen-shortfilm/storyboards/v1/
  - Filenames: storyboard_f01.png ... storyboard_f10.png (1920x1080 recommended; min 1280x720)
- Generate a contact sheet: /home/james/Hermes/state/projects/spooky-teen-shortfilm/storyboards/storyboard_contact_v1.png (3x4 or 4x3 grid)
- Include minimal captions under each frame (can be baked into PNG or separate CSV): storyboard_captions_v1.csv

Acceptance (quality gate)
- 10 PNG frames exist with clear blocking/lighting intent; reference lighting split is visible (fire key, lantern practical left FG, moon rim); key props appear where relevant.
- Contact sheet exists at the exact path above and composes all 10 frames.
- Return a file index with dimensions for each PNG and the absolute path to the contact sheet (no claims without file paths).

Notes
- Emphasize beats: battery persists OTS; marker persists; missing chair; phones-only darkness; Live Photo silhouette during motion; dawn button.
- Do not hand execution back; produce files and show their paths.

delivery_model.strategy_label: Lead -> Creative -> Game Dev -> App Dev
acceptance: Sub-R rating guardrails enforced; animated 2D stylized look; deliverables: style_bible.md, shot_list_v0.md, vo_script_v0.md

stage_guidance.operator: Own scope, freeze the delivery target, and keep the handoffs honest.
stage_guidance.creative-dev: Define the creative target, vision guardrails, and artifact acceptance language before implementation drifts.
stage_guidance.app-dev: Own the app, tooling, portal, and review-loop support needed to make the chosen artifact reviewable and repeatable.

handoff_contract: freeze one primary delivery target before downstream implementation expands scope
treat creative-dev as the vision and acceptance guardrail for downstream lanes
treat game-dev as the owner of the playable implementation path once the vision is frozen
treat app-dev as the owner of portal, tooling, packaging, and review-loop support after the build path is clear
require each lane to leave a concrete handoff for the next lane instead of sending the operator back into open-ended review

work_order.project_now: Inspiration integrated: updated style bible, lookdev pipeline, modeling assets, lighting rigs; regenerated styleframes to include lantern, tent, sign. Ready to block in Blender per rigs.
work_order.project_next: Block camp in Blender; render 4 hero styleframes (sf01-04) with NPR shader ramps and lighting from rigs; then replace placeholders in animatic.

acceptance: Sub-R rating guardrails enforced; animated 2D stylized look; deliverables: style_bible.md, shot_list_v0.md, vo_script_v0.md

structured_result.summary: Generated and QA-verified a 10-frame clean storyboard v1 (1920x1080) with contact sheet and captions using manifest-driven generator; patched tent, sign, lantern, logs, bedroll/pack, and roasting stick into relevant wides; verified dimensions and presence.
implemented: Patched props (f01 tent/sign/lantern/logs/pack+bedroll/roasting stick; f04 tent; f06 lantern)
verified: All 10 frames exist at 1920x1080 via IHDR read
Captions CSV present and aligned to manifest order
Lighting split visible: fire key (f01,f02,f06), moon rim (global cool bg), lantern FG left (f01,f06)
Key props appear where relevant: tent (f01,f04), sign (f01), lantern (f01,f06), logs (f01), bedroll/backpack (f01), roasting stick (f01), stone stack (f04)
assumed: Numeric phone time/percentage not strictly required for v1 acceptance so long as OTS battery icon is present
Blank cells in contact sheet grid acceptable with 10 populated frames
risks: OTS phone f03 lacks explicit numeric time/%; could be requested in review
Lantern/tent/sign are minimalist geometric reads; may need refinement for presentation
Visible center-safe guides may be distracting if not stripped later
next_actions: If desired, overlay block numerals '12:00 AM' and '3%' on f03 OTS (center-safe, large legible)
Optionally rebuild contact as 3x4 with labelled frames
Strip center-safe guides for v1.1 presentation after operator review
